alumni.name: James Caraan
alumni.quote: MMPNS taught me that success is built on strong foundations.
alumni.story: My journey at MMPNS began in the early 90s, a time when computers were just beginning to find their way into classrooms. I remember being fascinated by the new computer lab and spending countless hours after school learning to code. The teachers at MMPNS didn't just teach subjects—they nurtured curiosity and encouraged us to dream beyond our circumstances.
alumni.favoriteMemory: Winning the Inter-school Quiz Bee in Grade 6 with my team. We stayed after school for weeks preparing, and our teacher never gave up on us even when we doubted ourselves.
alumni.messageToMMPNS: Thank you for believing in a boy from a simple family and showing him that with education and determination, anything is possible. MMPNS will always be home.
